extension.description: Providing access to Cbilling.TV IPTV channels and VoD. Compatible with Kodi 19+ (Matrix and later)
extension.disclaimer: This addon is provided "as is" without any warranty. The authors are not liable for any data loss, corruption, or damages. This addon does not host any media content; users are responsible for legal compliance in their jurisdiction.

Аддон предоставляется «как есть» без каких-либо гарантий. Авторы не несут ответственности за потерю данных, их повреждение или любой ущерб. Аддон не размещает медиаконтент; пользователи несут ответственность за соблюдение законодательства в своей юрисдикции.
extension.news:
2.1.0 (unreleased) [fix] VOD search pagination: page parameter now passed to /filter/by_name and /filter/year API
2.0.5-dev [fix] EPG timezone: time now displays in user's configured timezone (stb_timezone setting) [fix] EPG time from API 'date' field (server timezone) is now ignored, Unix timestamps used instead [fix] EPG cache: t_time/t_time_to recalculated from timestamps on read (timezone change works instantly) [fix] SQLite: "no such table: config" crash when config table lost from existing EPG database [fix] SQLite: "NoneType is not callable" race condition between cron and UI threads [fix] SQLite: all connections use timeout=10 and WAL mode for concurrent access [info] Uses dateutil.tz from vendor for timezone conversion (no new dependencies) [info] Warning logged once if timezone setting is empty or invalid (fallback to system time) [new] Watch history: episodes navigate to episode list instead of direct playback [new] Episode list auto-positions cursor on the watched episode
2.0.4-dev [new] Watch History feature for VOD (configurable size, default 5 items) [new] Context menu for history items (remove, clear all) [new] Settings for history management [fix] IPTV channel sorting now respects server order [fix] VOD pagination - now showing all items with "Next page" button [fix] "All genres" folder now displays content correctly [fix] urllib3 compatibility with Python 3.8 (Kodi 19.4) [info] Added client-side pagination (20 items per page) [info] Auto-generate episode/season names when missing
2.0.3-dev [fix] EPG cache performance optimization [fix] Removed blocking EPG reload on channel list open [info] EPG now loads instantly, cache updates in background
2.0.2-dev [fix] Python 3.8 compatibility (Kodi 19/20) [fix] Fixed urllib3 type hints for older Python versions [info] Tested with Kodi 19.4 (Matrix) and Kodi 20 (Nexus)
2.0.1-dev [dev] Development version - API migration testing [info] This is a pre-release version for testing purposes
2.0.0 [new] Migrated from Stalker Portal to new REST API [new] Direct stream URLs (no more create_link calls) [new] Local favorites storage (no server dependency) [new] Simplified auth with public key [fix] Removed dependency on mag-aura.com Stalker Portal
XX.3.0 [fix] Speed optimization [fix] VOD opening (added to the favorites) after token expiration
XX.2.7 [fix] Improve auth error messaging
1X.2.6 [fix] Fix API server URL
1X.2.5 [fix] EPG timeout issue [new] Add response timeout selection to the config [new] Add stream server selection to the context menu
